GG0170L3_WLKG_UNEVEN_END_CD GG0170L3 Mobility: Ability to Walk 10 feet on uneven surface at Discharge Indicates the patient's ability to walk 10 feet on uneven or sloping surfaces (indoor or outdoor), such as turf or gravel at discharge. 06.
